## Pull Request Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm:

- [ ] **Type of change**:
  - [ ] New agent integration
  - [ ] Updated agent awareness doc
  - [ ] Reference document update
  - [ ] Installer change
  - [ ] Documentation / meta
- [ ] Agent awareness doc follows the fidelity ladder format (🔴 keep full / 🟡 default only / 🟢 compress freely)
- [ ] No "always prefix everything" language remains in updated files
- [ ] Installer tested locally (`bash install.sh` or `.\install.ps1`)
- [ ] Relevant `references/` files updated if shared content changed
